Module com.bifasico.soduko
Package com.bifasico.soduko.model

Class Cell

java.lang.Object
com.bifasico.soduko.model.Cell
public class Cell extends Object
Represents a single cell in the Sudoku board. This is the leaf node of the board tree structure. Each cell knows its absolute position (row, column) within the 6x6 grid.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Cell(int row, int column)
    Constructs a Cell with its absolute grid coordinates.

    Method
    Description

    Resets the player's guess and marked state for this cell.

    Returns the absolute column index of this cell within the 6x6 grid.

    Returns the effective display value of this cell.
    int

    Returns the value guessed by the player for this cell.

    Returns the absolute row index of this cell within the 6x6 grid.

    Returns the definitive solution value of this cell.

    Returns whether this cell is currently empty from the player's perspective.
    boolean

    Returns whether this cell was pre-filled at the start of the game and is therefore not editable by the player.
    boolean

    Returns whether the player has correctly confirmed this cell's value.

    Marks this cell as a given (pre-filled) cell visible from game start.

  • Constructor Details

    • Cell

      public Cell(int row, int column)
      Constructs a Cell with its absolute grid coordinates.
      Parameters:
      row - the absolute row index (0-based) in the 6x6 grid
      column - the absolute column index (0-based) in the 6x6 grid

  • Method Details

    • getValue

      public int getValue()
      Returns the definitive solution value of this cell.
      Returns:
      the correct answer value (1-6), or 0 if not yet assigned

    • setValue

      public void setValue(int value)
      Sets the definitive solution value for this cell.
      Parameters:
      value - the correct answer (1-6)

    • getRow

      public int getRow()
      Returns the absolute row index of this cell within the 6x6 grid.
      Returns:
      zero-based row index

    • getColumn

      public int getColumn()
      Returns the absolute column index of this cell within the 6x6 grid.
      Returns:
      zero-based column index

    • getGuess

      public int getGuess()
      Returns the value guessed by the player for this cell.
      Returns:
      the player's current guess (1-6), or 0 if empty

    • setGuess

      public void setGuess(int guess)
      Sets the value guessed by the player for this cell.
      Parameters:
      guess - the player's input (1-6), or 0 to clear

    • isGiven

      public boolean isGiven()
      Returns whether this cell was pre-filled at the start of the game and is therefore not editable by the player.
      Returns:
      true if this cell is a given (pre-filled, fixed) cell

    • setGiven

      public void setGiven(boolean given)
      Marks this cell as a given (pre-filled) cell visible from game start.
      Parameters:
      given - true to mark as given and non-editable

    • isMarked

      public boolean isMarked()
      Returns whether the player has correctly confirmed this cell's value. A marked cell has a guess that matches its solution value.
      Returns:
      true if the player has correctly filled this cell

    • setMarked

      public void setMarked(boolean marked)
      Sets the marked state for this cell. A cell should be marked when the player's guess matches the solution.
      Parameters:
      marked - true if the player has correctly solved this cell

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      Returns whether this cell is currently empty from the player's perspective. A given cell is never considered empty. A non-given cell is empty when no guess has been entered.
      Returns:
      true if the cell has no player input and is not a given

    • getDisplayValue

      public int getDisplayValue()
      Returns the effective display value of this cell. For given cells, returns the solution value. For player cells, returns the current guess (or 0 if empty).
      Returns:
      the value to display in the UI

    • clearGuess

      public void clearGuess()
      Resets the player's guess and marked state for this cell. Has no effect on given cells.
